raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Legislature approved a bill that would increase educational resources for undocumented students in high school and college.",
    "AB 2477 requires California State Universities (CSUs) to have a designated Dreamer Resource Liaison staffer to support undocumented and AB 540 students.",
    "It is estimated that approximately 65,000 undocumented students graduate from high schools in the United States each year.",
    "College affordability has become more attainable for undocumented students in California since the passage of various pieces of legislation including AB 540 and the CA Dream Act.",
    "Many undocumented students express concerns about the lack of knowledge their college faculty, staff, and administrators have about policies and services that support them.",
    "The Dreamer Resource Liaison created under AB 2477 will save staff time and resources by streamlining financial aid and academic opportunities for AB 540 students."
  ]
}
```
